author: alex-donnan
description: Connect to an SFTP and push/pull file changes to it.
name: SyncFTP

releases.author: alex-donnan
releases.description: Socks bugfixes. Socks proxies should now be available for use.

releases.author: alex-donnan
releases.description: Socks proxy and appropriate settings have been included.

releases.author: alex-donnan
releases.description:
Minor fixes across the board.

Primarily, adds the remote check for the vault and denies the pull or creates the vault during push.

releases.author: alex-donnan
releases.description:
First release of SyncFTP!

General functionality added, with destructive push-pull to an FTP of the user. Details are in the settings tab that is added once activated.
releases.name: Initial release

releases.author: alex-donnan
releases.description:
Rather than requiring explicit use of the icons for push-pull, there are now 2 commands that do the same thing. This also allows users to add hotkeys, such as _"on save, push"_. This does create a conflict message but does not inhibit functionality.

There's a new setting toggle as well, giving users the ability to enable a _"pull on load"_ if desired. It defaults to off.
